author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Two optimizer strategies exist: (1) In-place via data_mut() — panics on GPU (Adam, AdamW, RMSProp). (2) Replacement via TensorStorage::cpu() — creates CPU storage even for GPU params (SGD, Adagrad, Muon, LBFGS). Fix: add an unsafe update_data() method on Tensor that writes CPU data into storage on any device. For CPU it copies into the existing Vec; for GPU it uploads to a new buffer and swaps the StorageBuffer. Then update all optimizers to use it.
